description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a classic Bordeaux shape, featuring a tall, cylindrical body and gently sloping shoulders. The bottle is sealed with a dark closure, likely a cork, and is topped with a red foil or capsule that covers the neck and closure area. A gold-colored label wraps around the upper portion of the body, displaying the words 'WINE TITLE' in bold, with additional smaller text below, bordered by a decorative frame. The glass appears opaque, suggesting it is designed to protect the wine from light exposure. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with subtle reflections visible on the surface. The bottle is typical of those found in restaurants, wine shops, or urban outdoor events.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a gold label, red foil capsule, and a smooth, glossy finish. The bottle has a classic Bordeaux shape and a prominent closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold label with 'WINE TITLE' and decorative details, as well as the red foil capsule on the neck.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the edge of the label and the curvature of the bottle's body and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible label, highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted dark glass surface.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the other edge of the label and the bottle's profile.
attribute_label_or_branding: A gold rectangular label with a decorative border is placed on the upper body of the bottle, featuring the words 'WINE TITLE' in large, bold letters and smaller text below. The label is centered and wraps partially around the bottle. No logos or symbols are visible beyond the text and border.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow neck with a gentle taper and a straight profile, topped with a flared lip.
